title: Glory (Imperial-class)

The '''''Glory''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] best known as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of former [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].

==History==
In its early life, it was mostly used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for raids on outposts suspected of containing contraband, [[Battle of Pondut|including]] the headquarters of [[Galactic Electronics]], makers of the [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|mag pulse]] warhead for selling the technology to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

The ''Glory'' remained the flagship of Grand Admiral Zaarin when he launched an unsuccessful coup against [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The appearance of the ''Glory'' in a battle after Zaarin turned traitor was much like the rogue [[Admiral/Legends|admiral's]] personal calling card—it indicated that he took an active interest in the battle himself, and would usually withdraw before being heavily engaged. The ''Glory's'' few appearances in battle including the attempted capture of the Emperor, where it suffered significant damage from loyalist forces led by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], and supervising the [[Evacuation of Research|destruction]] of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] research facility in the [[Parmel system/Legends|Parmel system]].

While in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], Zaarin was able to keep his rival, then, Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], stalemated and his flagship unscathed for months. This was made further difficult because Zaarin used other smaller vessels or sent [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-capable [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to make attacks.

Thrawn, realizing that he had to play a different game if he was going to force Zaarin to blink, played on his enemy's undue reliance on technology. Thrawn developed a new starfighter called the [[Missile Boat]], not only to combat Zaarin's TIE Defenders but to police an attempt to proliferate them by [[Nami]] [[Pirate/Legends|Pirates]] lead by [[Crime lord/Legends|Crime Lord]] [[Ali Tarrak]]. When the Missile Boat proved to be an effective trump card, Thrawn dangled his project by producing [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] containing the fighters to lure Zaarin into a trap with them. After the [[Battle of Serenity|first attempt]] at [[Serenity (planet)|Serenity]] failed because the convoy was a decoy, Thrawn decided to use a real convoy to lure Zaarin out. But Thrawn underestimated Zaarin, who [[Ambush in the Semag system|ambushed]] his most important component of the trap, the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] [[Whirlwind (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Whirlwind'']]. Although the ''Whirlwind'' was saved by Maarek Stele in a Missile Boat, the cruiser was damaged and hopelessly behind schedule, and Zaarin sent a strike force earlier then predicted. Stele was once again able to [[Attack on the missile boat convoy|protect]] the missile convoy from Zaarin who came in the ''Glory'' to try and capture the shipment with a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Thinin]]'' and [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|Carrack-class light cruiser]] ''[[Yaai]]''. However the attempt was unsuccessful and only the ''Glory'' escaped harm.

Soon afterwards Zaarin learnt that the [[Vorknkx Project]], which was to create a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] on ships and had currently managed to cloak a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] [[Vorknkx|of the same name]] and sent a strike force to [[Attack on Vorknkx Project Base|attack]] and secure the project. When that failed, Thrawn knew that the project test bed could be used as bait to lure him out again. The plan worked and Zaarin brought the ''Glory'' into harm's way in order to retrieve the prototype technology from [[To-phalion Base]], an exhausted [[Asteroid/Legends|Asteroid]] [[Asteroid Hangar|Hanger]]. Though he was initially successful in capturing the project's [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]], Thrawn was able to follow him into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] due to a [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking]] device in the corvette. As the loyalist Imperials came with much greater forces, including the Interdictor [[Corvus (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Corvus'']], the ''Glory'' was [[Destruction of the Glory|destroyed]] under heavy fire. Zaarin escaped in the corvette ''[[Vorknkx]]'' but he was unaware of the device's unstability when the device is used in conjunction with hyperdrive engines and thus the corvette exploded when he activated it while entering hyperspace.<ref name="TIE" />

[[File:Vorknyx.jpg|thumb|right|200pxright|Zaarin's flagship ''Glory'' showing damage from loyalist forces, as the traitor tries to flee in the corvette ''[[Vorknkx]]'' .]]
